title: BEM-866 minimal queue step
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
step = '''
      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue minimal
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PY'
          import json, pathlib, shutil, subprocess
          q = pathlib.Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
          p = pathlib.Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed')
          r = pathlib.Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
          q.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); p.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); r.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
          for item in sorted(q.glob('*.json')):
              data = json.loads(item.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
              workflow = data.get('workflow')
              ref = data.get('ref', 'main')
              inputs = data.get('inputs', {})
              cmd = ['gh', 'workflow', 'run', workflow, '--ref', ref]
              for k, v in inputs.items():
                  cmd += ['-f', f'{k}={v}']
              status = 'DISPATCHED'; err = None
              try:
                  subprocess.run(cmd, check=True)
              except Exception as exc:
                  status = 'DISPATCH_FAILED'; err = str(exc)[:1000]
              (r / item.name.replace('.json', '_result.json')).write_text(json.dumps({'status': status, 'workflow': workflow, 'ref': ref, 'inputs': inputs, 'error': err}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
              shutil.move(str(item), str(p / item.name))
          PY

'''
anchor = '      - name: Commit and push everything
'
if 'Process workflow dispatch queue minimal' not in text and anchor in text:
    text = text.replace(anchor, step + anchor)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_MINIMAL_QUEUE_STEP_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 minimal queue step patched
Status: PATCHED
Step: Process workflow dispatch queue minimal
', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('added minimal queue processor step before commit')
"""
No issue comments.
